description: Inputs passed to the Blockaid policy WASM at evaluation time

to.description: Recipient or contract address being called (0x-prefixed).

value.description: Transaction value in wei as a 0x-prefixed hex string. Defaults to '0x0' when omitted.

data.description: Transaction calldata as a 0x-prefixed hex string. Defaults to '0x' when omitted.
